deploymentManaged.title: Deployment-managed configuration
deploymentManaged.body: Stripe credentials come from STRIPE_SECRET_KEY and STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET. Update them in the deployment environment and restart the service.

connectionFailed.title: Stripe connection failed
connectionFailed.body: Check STRIPE_SECRET_KEY / STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET in the deployment environment, or Stripe service availability.

plans.createDescription: Create a custom plan or provision the USD 20, 50, and 100 monthly catalog

credits.description: Gate starts by balance threshold; charge points from actual AI cost after completion.

llmProviders.heading: Providers
llmProviders.subtitle: Configure LLM providers, Base URL, and encrypted API keys.

accessRequired.title: Administrator access required
accessRequired.body: Your account does not have permission to manage providers.

llmProviders.listDescription: Enable a provider and save its key, then add models on the Models page.
llmProviders.formDescription: Choose a driver (factory type), give this instance a unique id, then set Base URL and API key. The same driver can be added multiple times.
llmProviders.deleteBodyWithModels: “{{name}}” still has {{count}} model(s). Deleting the provider will also remove those models (including default links). Continue?

fields.enabledHint: When disabled, its models stay out of the user picker.

llmModels.heading: Models
llmModels.subtitle: Add models and sync prices manually. Set default quick/deep models in System settings.

accessRequired.title: Administrator access required
accessRequired.body: Your account does not have permission to manage models.

llmModels.defaultsDescription: Used when the user does not pick models. Save independently from the add form.
llmModels.listDescription: Open models appear in the user analysis picker.
llmModels.addDescription: Enter a model ID; optionally sync-preview prices before creating.
llmModels.editDescription: Update prices, limits, params, and open status. Sync from upstream when needed.
llmModels.upstreamLoadError: Unable to load upstream models; enter a model ID manually.

fields.enabledHint: Open models appear in the analysis model picker.
fields.openOnCreateHint: Open models appear in the analysis model picker.

errors.unitTokens: Unit tokens must be a positive integer

settings.title: System settings
settings.heading: System settings
settings.subtitle: Default LLM models, analysis credit FX rate, and signup/referral rewards.

accessRequired.title: Administrator access required
accessRequired.body: Your account does not have permission to manage system settings.

settings.llmDefaultsDescription: Stored as system setting key llm. Used when the user does not pick models.
settings.llmDefaultsPairRequired: Set both default quick and deep models, or leave both empty.

billing.title: Analysis credit charging
billing.description: Stored in system_settings.billing. Balance threshold gates new runs; finished jobs charge from USD cost, points-per-USD rate, and markup.
billing.balanceThresholdHint: Available credits must be strictly greater than this value to start analysis. Credits are deducted after completion from actual cost.
billing.pointsPerUsdHint: How many credits equal $1 of AI cost before markup.
billing.markupHint: Extra percentage applied after FX conversion; 10 means +10%.
billing.sampleCostHint: Local preview only; not saved. Use 1 to see points charged per $1.
billing.formulaInvalid: Enter a valid sample cost, points-per-USD rate, and markup to preview the formula
billing.saveError: Unable to save analysis charging settings.

rewards.title: Credit rewards
rewards.description: Stored in system_settings.rewards. Signup and referral are independent and do not affect analysis charging.

signup.title: Signup reward
signup.description: Points granted on a new user's first visit.

referral.title: Referral reward
referral.description: Points granted to the referrer when an invite succeeds.
